# SODAX Stake

**Stake SODA for xSODA and earn 20% of protocol revenue.** Stake the native SODA token to share in the fees generated by the SODAX network across 18+ partner-integrated networks.

## What it does

Staking SODA mints xSODA, which represents a claim on a share of protocol revenue. 20% of the revenue generated by the SODAX system is distributed to xSODA holders.

## Key facts

- **20% of protocol revenue** flows to stakers.
- **Higher APR for longer locks** — up to 180 days. Lock duration sets the rate multiplier.
- **xSODA** is the staked-SODA receipt token.
- **Early unstaking** is allowed but incurs a penalty, which is redistributed to remaining stakers.
- **Deflationary loop** — every swap on partner protocols across 18 networks burns SODA, reducing supply while staker yield grows from the same fee flow.
